words.definition: To examine something in detail to understand its nature or structure.
words.example: Students need to analyze the main arguments in the article.
words.example_translation: 學生需要分析文章中的主要論點。

words.definition: A result or effect of an action or condition.
words.example: Smoking can have serious consequences on your health.
words.example_translation: 吸煙會對你的健康產生嚴重的後果。

words.definition: Relating to the natural world and the impact of human activity on it.
words.example: We should take steps to protect the environment.
words.example_translation: 我們應該採取措施保護環境。

words.definition: A particular attitude toward or way of regarding something; a point of view.
words.example: Try to see the problem from a different perspective.
words.example_translation: 試著從不同的角度來看這個問題。

words.definition: Sufficiently great or important to be worthy of attention.
words.example: There has been a significant increase in online learning.
words.example_translation: 線上學習有了顯著的增長。

words.definition: To work jointly with others on an activity or project.
words.example: The team will collaborate to complete the science project.
words.example_translation: 團隊將合作完成科學項目。

words.definition: Able to be maintained at a certain rate or level; conserving an ecological balance.
words.example: Using renewable energy is a sustainable practice.
words.example_translation: 使用可再生能源是一種可持續的做法。

words.definition: To form an idea of the amount, number, or value of something; to assess.
words.example: Teachers evaluate students based on their class participation.
words.example_translation: 老師根據學生的課堂參與度來評估他們。

words.definition: Favorable or advantageous; resulting in good.
words.example: Regular exercise is beneficial to mental health.
words.example_translation: 定期運動對心理健康有益。

words.definition: To clearly show the existence or truth of something by giving proof or evidence.
words.example: The experiment demonstrates how gravity works.
words.example_translation: 這個實驗展示了重力是如何運作的。

words.definition: A group of people living in the same place or having a particular characteristic in common.
words.example: Volunteering helps strengthen the local community.
words.example_translation: 志願服務有助於加強當地社區。

words.definition: To explain the meaning of information, words, or actions.
words.example: It is difficult to interpret the poet's message accurately.
words.example_translation: 準確詮釋詩人的訊息很困難。

words.definition: A call to take part in a contest or competition; a task that tests someone's abilities.
words.example: Learning a new language can be a fun challenge.
words.example_translation: 學習一種新語言可以是一個有趣的挑戰。

words.definition: Having an obligation to do something, or having control over or care for someone, taken on as one's duty.
words.example: We are all responsible for keeping our classroom clean.
words.example_translation: 我們都有責任保持教室整潔。

words.definition: A set of circumstances that makes it possible to do something.
words.example: Studying abroad is a great opportunity to broaden your horizons.
words.example_translation: 出國留學是開闊視野的好機會。

words.definition: The capacity to have an effect on the character, development, or behavior of someone or something.
words.example: Peers can have a strong influence on teenagers' choices.
words.example_translation: 同齡人對青少年的選擇有強烈的影響。

words.definition: To publicly recommend or support a particular cause or policy.
words.example: Many students advocate for less homework.
words.example_translation: 許多學生提倡減少家庭作業。

words.definition: Showing a great deal of variety; very different.
words.example: Hong Kong has a diverse cultural heritage.
words.example_translation: 香港擁有豐富多元的文化遺產。

words.definition: To designate or treat (something) as more important than other things.
words.example: You should prioritize your study time before exams.
words.example_translation: 在考試前，你應該優先安排學習時間。

words.definition: The ability to understand and share the feelings of another.
words.example: Showing empathy is important in building friendships.
words.example_translation: 展現同理心對於建立友誼很重要。
